title: biophytum sensitivum var. candolleanum
intro: Biophytum sensitivum var. candolleanum, also known as Amla, is a small herbaceous plant belonging to the family Oxalidaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Biophytum sensitivum var. candolleanum include reducing fever, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction, powder, or juice, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
